mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, nickname, status, remark, create_time, update_time FROM accounts ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, user_id, username, nickname, status, remark, create_time, update_time FROM accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO accounts (user_id, username, nickname, status, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{nickname}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), #{remark})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE accounts SET user_id = #{userId}, username = #{username}, nickname = #{nickname}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, status), remark = #{remark}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId}
